hunt.title: Magic Wand Companion
hunt.copy: Tap your wand at a magic spot to collect it. Scan your wand here to see your progress and hints.
hunt.empty_no_data: No hunt data found on your wand yet. Visit a magic spot!
hunt.empty_scanning: Hold your wand close to begin your magical adventure!
hunt.progress_remaining: 0 spots remaining | 1 spot remaining | {n} spots remaining
hunt.progress_none: No spots collected yet — tap your wand at a magic spot!

archive.title: Hunt Archive
archive.copy: Browse all hunts — including ones you may have missed.

toybox.title: Toybox
toybox.copy: Initialize a wand and tune record 1 without disturbing your hunt progress.
toybox.install_note: Add the wand companion to your home screen as a standalone app when your browser supports installation.
toybox.action_note: Choose what the wand does on a normal NFC tap. Treasure progress is always preserved when writing.

url.label: Open Website
url.description: Open a normal web page when the wand is tapped.

text.label: Show Message
text.description: Display a short magical note on compatible devices.

app.label: Open App Link
app.description: Launch a custom deep link like spotify:, discord:, or app://.

email.label: Compose Email
email.description: Prepare an email to a chosen address with subject and body.

phone.label: Call Number
phone.description: Dial a phone number directly from the tap.

sms.label: Text Message
sms.description: Open a text message draft to a chosen number.

body.label: Message
body.placeholder: Meet me at the next magic spot!

geo.label: Open Map Pin
geo.description: Jump to coordinates in a mapping app.

contact.label: Share Contact
contact.description: Write a vCard so the wand can share a person or project contact.

calendar.label: Calendar Event
calendar.description: Create a calendar invitation from the wand.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Bring your wand and your sharpest clues.

toybox.admin_note: These controls are for setup, testing, and debugging. We plan to remove them from the public Toybox flow later.
toybox.init_note: Initialize a blank NFC tag as an official wand. The wand can then collect treasures on your adventure.
toybox.init_error_name_too_long: Owner name is too long (max 127 characters).
toybox.unlock_note: Add any spot from any hunt year onto the wand for testing and debug flows.
toybox.unlock_error_select: Choose a hunt year and a spot first.

nfc.not_supported: Web NFC is not available. Open this page in Chrome on Android over HTTPS.
nfc.unavailable: Web NFC is unavailable. Use HTTPS on Android Chrome or Samsung Internet.
nfc.permission_denied: NFC permission was denied. Please allow NFC access in your browser settings and refresh.
nfc.read_failed: Could not read the wand. Try again.
nfc.write_verify: Hold the wand near your device to verify and write...
nfc.write_verify_reading: Hold the wand near your device to verify its current records...
nfc.write_record1_success: Record 1 written! The tag was read first and treasure progress was preserved.
nfc.init_prompt: Bring blank tag to initialize as wand...
nfc.unlock_prompt: Hold the wand near your device to unlock spot {spot} for {year}...
nfc.unlock_success: Unlocked spot {spot} for {year} on the wand.
nfc.unlock_invalid: Choose a valid hunt year and a spot ID between 1 and 64.

consent.title: Enable Wand Scanner?
consent.desc: Allow NFC scanning so your phone can read magic wands automatically.

init_page.title: Wand Workshop
init_page.error_name_too_long: Owner name is too long (max 127 characters).
init_page.error_no_nfc: Web NFC is not supported on this device.

configure_page.title: Spot Configurator
configure_page.copy: Connect to a Magic Spot over USB or Bluetooth to configure its ID and year.
configure_page.connect_instruction: Connect your device and click a button below to start configuration.
